charge_after_advance.description: Allows a unit to charge in the same turn it advanced.

charge_after_flee.description: Allows a unit to charge in a turn in which it fell back.

charge_impact.description: After this unit has charged, select one enemy unit withing engagement. Roll 1d6 : On a 4+, the target suffers 1 mortal wound

closest_target_penetration.description: When this unit makes a shooting attack at the closest eligible unit, add 1 to the weapon's penetration.

reroll_1_towound.description: When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the wound rolls.

reroll_towound_target_on_objective.description: When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll the wound rolls if the target unit is on an objective.

shoot_after_flee.description: Allows a unit to shoot in a turn in which it fell back.

targeted_intercession.description: Assault Interecessor : When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the wound rolls. If the target is on an objective, it can reroll the wound rolls.

adaptable_predators.description: Tyranid Warrior (range) : This unit can shoot and charge in a turn in which it fell back.
